name: ngo-agent-skills
description: Evidence-grounded Agent Skills for NGO program design, monitoring & evaluation, SDG alignment, and funding strategy. Install only the skills you need.

plugins.name: sdg-alignment-mapper
plugins.description: Maps an NGO/development program's activities, target group, and intended outcomes to relevant UN SDG goals, targets, and global indicators, with optional national-context overlays.

plugins.name: logframe-toc-builder
plugins.description: Builds a logical framework (logframe) matrix and/or Theory of Change narrative for an NGO or development program from its stated goal and planned activities.

plugins.name: earned-income-model-screener
plugins.description: Screens and classifies earned-income and social-enterprise ideas using Kim Alter's Social Enterprise Typology and the Matrix Map (mission impact vs. financial profitability).

plugins.name: funding-mix-diversification-planner
plugins.description: Analyzes an NGO's current funding mix and recommends how to diversify it, including toward earned income, using the Ten Nonprofit Funding Models framework.

plugins.name: oecd-dac-criteria-screener
plugins.description: Screens an NGO or development program's design against the six OECD-DAC evaluation criteria (Relevance, Coherence, Effectiveness, Efficiency, Impact, Sustainability), rating each honestly and flagging evidence gaps before a real donor evaluation does.
